## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was it needed?

## Verification

- [ ] I ran `pnpm check`
- [ ] I added or updated automated tests for every behavior change
- [ ] I covered the change at the right level: unit, integration, or E2E
- [ ] I validated auth, authorization, and tenant isolation impact when applicable

## Risks

- Remaining risks, edge cases, or follow-up work
